stemHtml: A precautionary landing may be made in certain situations, such as approaching darkness, low fuel etc. Which of the following statements is correct regarding a precautionary landing?

options.a: A precautionary landing is always made at an aerodrome as it poses no risk to operational safety.
options.b: A precautionary landing is when the crew cannot continue or the aircraft cannot fly.
options.c: Emergency or local standby procedures must be activated.
options.d: Whenever a change to the filed flight plan is made, ATC must be notified by the standard procedures.
